phases.name: Write judge-scorer integration tests
phases.reasoning: Write all 6 T08 tests: test_scorer_with_judge_uses_judge_actionability, test_scorer_with_judge_false_positive_reduces_precision, test_scorer_without_judge_uses_neutral_defaults, test_scorer_with_judge_must_not_flag_still_counts, test_scorer_with_judge_empty_actionability_falls_back, test_scorer_with_judge_computes_full_composite. These cover: judge actionability averaging, judge FP reducing precision, backward-compatible None path, must_not_flag precedence over judge, empty actionability fallback, and full composite integration. Tests will not compile yet since score() signature hasn't changed.

phases.name: Implement judge-scorer wiring
phases.reasoning: Modify scorer.rs: (1) add import for ClassificationVerdict and JudgeResult from judge.rs, (2) change Scorer::score() signature to accept Option<&JudgeResult>, (3) implement actionability computation from judge with 0.5 fallback, (4) add compute_precision_with_judge() incorporating must_not_flag hits + judge FP classifications on novel findings, (5) add count_must_not_flag_hits() and identify_novel_findings() helpers to FindingMatcher, (6) update all existing T06 tests to pass None as third argument, (7) wrap old compute_precision as convenience delegator, (8) run cargo clippy and fix warnings. All changes in single file scorer.rs.
